summary: PRC Subscription Display Bug Fix VERIFIED. All values now correct on SubscriptionPlans page: PRC Rate=11 (was 10), Admin Charge=20% (was 100%), Total PRC=15,692.42 (was 23,576), Processing Fee ₹10 visible in breakdown.
critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionPlans.js getPRCPrice() now correctly uses elitePrcPrice from backend API instead of manual calculation with PRC_MULTIPLIER
PRCRateDisplay.js fetchCurrentRate() has 3-level fallback: admin endpoint -> prc-economy/current-rate -> elite-pricing
PRCRateDisplay.js adminChargePercent prop correctly defaults to 20 (was hardcoded 100)
Backend /api/subscription/elite-pricing returns exact pricing with formula breakdown
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRC subscription display bug is FIXED. SubscriptionPlans.js now shows correct values: PRC Rate=11, Admin Charge=20%, Total PRC=15,692.42, Processing Fee ₹10. The fix removed PRC_MULTIPLIER=2 hack and now uses backend /api/subscription/elite-pricing for exact pricing. PRCRateDisplay component has 3-level fallback for PRC rate.

bug_fix_verification.root_cause: PRC_MULTIPLIER=2 hack and hardcoded adminChargePercent=100 in frontend
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Removed PRC_MULTIPLIER, use backend API for pricing, fixed adminChargePercent to 20
